Meta.Architecture: Singleton-based Managers transitioning to Event-Driven (Event Broker).

Dependencies.Package: New Input System for player controls.

CoreScenes.Scene: Main menu and lobby for turret selection.

Module.name: GameManager
Module.Responsibility: Singleton managing global state (HP, Score, GameState).

Module.name: GameHUD
Module.Responsibility: UI controller for real-time gameplay feedback via UI Toolkit.

Module.name: TurretShooter
Module.Responsibility: Player input handling for 360-degree combat.

Module.name: EnemySpawner
Module.Responsibility: Wave-based enemy generation logic using Object Pooling.

Module.name: Projectile
Module.Responsibility: Projectile physics and collision handling.

Module.name: EnemyBot
Module.Responsibility: Enemy AI and basic movement logic.

Module.name: TitanCoreAI
Module.Responsibility: Titan Core Boss AI logic with 3-phase combat, laser casting, and bullet spawning.

Module.name: WaveManager
Module.Responsibility: Manages wave progression and publishes WaveStarted/Completed events.

Module.name: FeverManager
Module.Responsibility: Tracks enemy kills and manages the Fever Mode gauge.

Module.name: StartMenuController
Module.Responsibility: Main menu interaction and scene management.

Module.name: VFXTrigger
Module.Responsibility: Spawns particle VFX at hit location on damage/death events.

Module.name: SFXTrigger
Module.Responsibility: Plays sound effects on damage/death events.

Module.name: HitFlash
Module.Responsibility: MaterialPropertyBlock emission flash on damage for visual hit feedback.

Module.name: TacticalSkills
Module.Responsibility: Active tactical skills (EMP, Orbital Strike, Overload Shield) triggered by player.

Module.name: EnergyManager
Module.Responsibility: Manages tactical energy gathered from enemy kills.

Module.name: OverchargeController
Module.Responsibility: Controls player weapon overcharge gauge, heat levels, and overheat penalty.

Module.name: ItemDrop
Module.Responsibility: Drop item logic (Repair Kit, Magnet, Smart Bomb) that triggers corresponding gameplay effects on collection.

Module.name: ItemSpawner
Module.Responsibility: Handles item spawn rate, guaranteed thresholds, and spawning logic.

Module.name: MetaUpgradeManager
Module.Responsibility: Manages meta upgrades (permanent player stat improvements) purchased with Gems.

Module.name: GemWallet
Module.Responsibility: Stores persistent player Gem currency balance and publishes GemChangedEvent.

Module.name: LobbyController
Module.Responsibility: Manages the lobby scene and Meta Upgrade UI shop cards.

Module.name: WeaponTransitionHandler
Module.Responsibility: Handles seamless weapon swapping and visual/logic transition states.

Module.name: OverdriveEvolution
Module.Responsibility: Controls ultimate overdrive evolution checks when boss chests are opened.

StrictConventions.Rule: Focus exclusively on Wave Mode development.
Strictly avoid GameObject.Find(); use inspector refs or singletons.
Prefer Unity UI Toolkit for new UI screens.
Use K&R style braces for all C# scripts.
